concerns.text: Constitution Principle III mandates checksums recorded under `data/`. T076/T077 only record in state YAML and manifest.json, leaving the mandated `data/` location unpopulated.
Constitution Principle II requires Reference-Validator Agent to verify all external citations. No task is defined to run this agent on citations in spec/plan/docs.
FR-004b mandates emitting a `data_quality_warning` message for sample-size mismatches. T024 mentions FR-004b but does not verify the warning message format is generated.
FR-007 requires error descriptions ≤200 characters. T008/T019 implement logging but include no verification step for the 200-character limit.
Constitution Principle VII requires provenance metadata recorded in `data/`. Tasks store provenance in output audit records but do not archive it in `data/` directory.
